hero.name: Erick Morales
hero.title: Backend Engineer & DevOps Enthusiast
hero.subtitle: 10+ years building scalable systems across enterprise, cloud and infrastructure

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I'm a Software Engineer with over 10 years of experience in software development and DevOps, based in Guatemala City. I specialize in backend systems, enterprise integrations and cloud infrastructure, with a strong track record across industries including telecommunications, insurance, logistics and fintech.
about.p2: I thrive at the intersection of software and infrastructure. Outside of professional work, I run a personal homelab built on Proxmox, Docker and a self-hosted networking stack — which has deepened my passion for automation, observability and systems reliability.
about.p3: My development methodology is SCRUM — adopted since the beginning of my career — and I hold a Professional SCRUM Developer I certification. I believe in clean code, continuous improvement and getting things deployed correctly from day one.

skills.title: Skills & Technologies
skills.subtitle: A decade of hands-on experience across the full technology stack

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.subtitle: 10+ years building software across startups, enterprises and consultancies

jobs.description: Contractor at Improving, a software consulting firm. Assigned to multiple client engagements across industries including healthcare, technology and digital media. Also contributing directly to internal platform development using Sitefinity CMS, building custom widgets and template applications with .NET Framework and Dynamics 365 integrations, plus a React.js frontend using Redux reducers and Ant Design components with custom hooks.

clients.description: Software Engineer for a Partner Referral Portal integrated with Pipedrive, providing real-time deal visibility and referral-based rewards. Led end-to-end development of a new module within a 2-month timeframe, transitioning a fully manual process into a scalable automated solution. Full-stack engineer across Proxima and Manager App.

Software Engineer for a Digital Music Platform Modernization, transitioning a legacy app into a subscription-based model (streaming, sheet music, devotional videos). Built micro-frontend architecture with React/Vite and .NET backend, accelerating releases from monthly to weekly cadence.

Software Engineer for a Legacy System Replacement, modernizing an outdated platform using Python (Django) and MongoDB on the backend and React with Vite on the frontend. Delivered improved performance, flexible data structure and long-term maintainability.

Software Engineer supporting a Healthcare Rewards Platform, configuring reward structures for U.S.-based medical programs. Ramped up quickly on Java, Spring Boot, Kotlin and Oracle DB, engaging directly with stakeholders to clarify evolving requirements.

jobs.description: Freelance contractor through BairesDev, assigned to multiple accounts across Healthcare and Oil & Gas industries. Provided remote support to backend services built on .NET and frontend applications built with React, working in different roles including developer and contractor across client engagements.

jobs.role: Software Developer II / Software Configuration Manager
jobs.description: Software developer for Travelers Insurance Business Unit, working with custom tools for paper and electronic document intake and Optical Character Recognition. Led the company's migration to Git version control and became sole responsible for Software Configuration Management across all teams — including version control strategy, release pipelines via Azure DevOps and continuous improvement of the CI/CD process.

Supported telecommunications applications for Telefónica Spain. Responsibilities included analysis of new software requirements, production deployments, incident resolution and regression testing for backend services built with Java, Spring and Hibernate.

Created and maintained desktop and web applications using the .NET platform across MVC, WCF and Windows Services architectures. Supported an internal POS system and ERP used across the corporation and its commercial services vice-presidency.
Designed and built desktop and web applications on the .NET platform. Lead developer of 'Tracker', a process automation and ERP system built from scratch for the company's internal operations.

Created web applications using CodeIgniter, Laravel and WordPress. Built RESTful web services to power mobile applications, implementing JWT-based authentication. Worked across the full stack including frontend, backend and database layers.

Developed ERP and WMS business software focused on logistics and warehouse management. Built web modules for MySwiftExpress, the company's flagship logistics platform, using ASP.NET and DevExpress. Managed SQL Server databases and Windows server environments.
